title: Date Comparison in JavaScript
summary: Working with dates is a common task in web development, and JavaScript provides a powerful set of tools for manipulating and comparing dates. content: Working with dates is a common task in web development, and JavaScript provides a powerful set of tools for manipulating and comparing dates. Whether you’re building a scheduling application, calculating the age of a user, or implementing date-based logic, understanding how to compare dates in JavaScript is essential. In this guide, we’ll explore various techniques and best practices for comparing dates in JavaScript.
